description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat, elongated layout and a minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. A dark fence surrounds the property, and there is a driveway leading up to the main entrance, which is flanked by a small landscaped area with a tree and some greenery. The roof is flat and features skylights or solar panels, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The property is bordered by a paved walkway and driveway, providing access for vehicles and pedestrians. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a surrounding dark fence, set within a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a tree on the left side behind the dark fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, flat roof, and the linear arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back fence, additional windows, and a clear view of the flat roof features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway extending out, a tree at the rear, and the back of the bungalow visible.
